gems.name: MouseClick
gems.description: 🖱️ MouseClick 🖱️ 是一款功能强大的鼠标连点器和管理工具，采用 QT Widget 开发 ，具备跨平台兼容性 。软件界面美观 ，操作直观，支持鼠标行为模拟 💻，让用户在工作和游戏中实现高效自动化 🚀。提升你的数字生活体验，一切尽在掌控之中 🌟！

gems.name: MAME4droid-Current
gems.description: MAME4droid (Current) is developed by David Valdeita (Seleuco) as a port of the latest MAME emulator by MAMEDev and contributors. It emulates arcade games and systems like ZX Spectrum, Amstrad CPC, MSX etc. This version of MAME support over 40000 different ROMs.
